name: smj-skills
description: Agent skill stack for submitting to the Strategic Management Journal (SMJ), the flagship strategy journal published by Wiley for the Strategic Management Society. Covers strategy-grounded topic selection, theory development, literature positioning, research design, endogeneity-aware data analysis (panel FE, IV, Heckman, DID/natural experiments, matching), contribution framing, exhibits, house style, ScholarOne submission, multi-round review, and rebuttals. English docs with bilingual README; verify volatile journal specifics on the official page.
